meta.siteName: American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research
meta.description: Licensed institute for applied education in tourism and administrative research — diplomas, courses, e-learning, and accredited programmes aligned with labour market needs.

footer.bio: A leading academic institute dedicated to applied education in tourism and administrative research, empowering professionals with rigorous programs and international standards.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get updates on new programs, events, and research publications.

home.heroSubtitle: Advance your career with internationally accredited programs designed for the global tourism and administrative sectors.
home.whySubtitle: More than a decade of proven results, international standards, and learner-centred excellence.
home.whyFeature1Desc: Over a decade of industry expertise in tourism, hospitality, and administrative leadership across the MENA region.
home.whyFeature2Desc: Curricula benchmarked against the world's leading academic and professional institutions, ensuring global relevance.
home.whyFeature3Desc: Hands-on case studies, simulations, and field projects that deliver immediate, measurable workplace impact.
home.whyFeature4Desc: ISO-aligned and nationally recognised qualifications trusted by leading employers and government bodies.
home.whyFeature5Desc: Dedicated alumni support, career services portal, and lifelong access to our curated learning resources.
home.programsSubtitle: Explore our most sought-after tracks — each designed to deliver real-world impact from day one.
home.accreditationsSubtitle: Recognised by leading national and international bodies.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real outcomes from professionals who transformed their careers with us.
home.newsSubtitle: Stay informed on research, events, and new program launches.

about.title: About the Institute
about.subtitle: Over a decade of applied excellence in tourism and administrative education across the MENA region.
about.visionText: To be the regional reference for applied education and research excellence in tourism and administration, shaping leaders who drive sustainable growth.
about.missionText: We deliver practice-oriented programs, foster applied research, and partner with industry to shape responsible, globally-minded leaders.
about.valuesText: Integrity, excellence, international outlook, and continuous improvement guide every initiative we undertake.
about.value1Desc: Rigorous standards and evidence-based curricula that stand up to international scrutiny.
about.value2Desc: Programs benchmarked against global leaders, preparing graduates for international careers.
about.value3Desc: Transparent, ethical practices in all academic, research, and institutional activities.
about.value4Desc: Learning that delivers measurable change — in workplaces, communities, and careers.
about.storyP1: What began as a single applied-training cohort of 32 professionals in Cairo has grown into a regionally recognised institute serving graduates across 18 countries. Our founding conviction — that professional knowledge must be immediately applicable — still drives every program we design.
about.storyP2: Accredited by national and international bodies and backed by a faculty of practising industry experts, we have shaped over 3,200 careers in tourism, hospitality, quality management, and administrative leadership. Today, our graduates hold senior roles in government agencies, hotel chains, and multinational enterprises across the Arab world and beyond.
about.teamSubtitle: World-class academics and industry veterans united by a passion for transformative education.

programs.title: Academic Programs
programs.subtitle: Rigorous, accredited tracks across tourism, hospitality, quality, and administrative leadership.

certifications.title: Certifications & Accreditations
certifications.subtitle: Our programs meet the highest national and international quality standards — verified by independent bodies.
certifications.description: International quality management certification confirming our institute meets rigorous standards for educational delivery, assessment, and continuous improvement.

certItems.name: ISO 9001:2015 QMS
certItems.text: Quality Management System certification verifying our institute meets ISO 9001:2015 standards for educational design, delivery, and continuous improvement.

certItems.name: National Standards Recognition
certItems.text: National quality recognition certifying compliance with Egyptian educational and training delivery standards for professional and vocational programmes.

certItems.name: Quality Institute Award
certItems.text: Excellence award recognising our contribution to raising professional training quality standards across the tourism and administrative sectors nationally.

certItems.name: Integrated Management System
certItems.text: Integrated management certification validating our institute's environmental, health, safety, and quality frameworks to international multi-standard requirements.

resources.title: Resources & Publications
resources.subtitle: Free access to research briefs, practical toolkits, and professional development content.

en.title: Tourism Sector Competency Framework 2025
en.excerpt: A practical framework mapping 28 core competencies for hospitality and tourism professionals, benchmarked against international standards.

ar.title: إطار كفاءات قطاع السياحة 2025
ar.excerpt: إطار عملي يحدد 28 كفاءة جوهرية لمهنيي الضيافة والسياحة، مقارنةً بالمعايير الدولية.

en.title: Sustainable Tourism: Practical Implementation Guide
en.excerpt: Evidence-based strategies for embedding sustainability into hotel and destination operations without sacrificing guest experience.

ar.title: السياحة المستدامة: دليل التطبيق العملي
ar.excerpt: استراتيجيات قائمة على الأدلة لتضمين الاستدامة في عمليات الفنادق والوجهات السياحية.

en.title: Masterclass: Revenue Management in the Digital Age
en.excerpt: A 90-minute masterclass covering OTA optimisation, dynamic pricing, and data-driven forecasting for hospitality.

ar.title: ماستركلاس: إدارة الإيرادات في العصر الرقمي
ar.excerpt: ماستركلاس 90 دقيقة يغطي تحسين OTA والتسعير الديناميكي والتنبؤ المبني على البيانات.

en.title: ISO 9001 Internal Audit Checklist — Hospitality Edition
en.excerpt: A ready-to-use 64-point audit checklist aligned with ISO 9001:2015 requirements for hotel and tourism organisations.

ar.title: قائمة تدقيق داخلي أيزو 9001 — نسخة الضيافة
ar.excerpt: قائمة تدقيق جاهزة من 64 نقطة تتوافق مع متطلبات ISO 9001:2015 لمنظمات الفنادق والسياحة.

en.title: Post-Pandemic Workforce Recovery: Lessons from the Field
en.excerpt: A research synthesis examining how leading tourism organisations rebuilt talent pipelines and retention strategies post-2020.

ar.title: تعافي القوى العاملة بعد الجائحة: دروس ميدانية
ar.excerpt: تحليل بحثي يرصد كيف أعادت منظمات السياحة الرائدة بناء مسارات المواهب واستراتيجيات الاحتفاظ.

en.title: Webinar: Designing Effective Training Programmes
en.excerpt: Expert panel discussion on ADDIE model application, needs analysis, and impact measurement in professional training.

ar.title: ندوة إلكترونية: تصميم برامج تدريب فعّالة
ar.excerpt: نقاش مع خبراء حول تطبيق نموذج ADDIE وتحليل الاحتياجات وقياس الأثر في التدريب المهني.
